scenes.text: A chain is only as strong as its weakest link.
Every business is a line. You design, you build, you ship.
But one station is the slowest. Work piles up. Throughput drops.
So you speed up the others. Faster designers. Same output. More inventory waiting.
Fix the slow station. The whole line jumps.
Throughput is set by the bottleneck. Improving anything else is theatre.
Find the slow link. Then break it.
